projectDescription: An Android terminal emulator and Linux environment that brings a full command-line experience to Android devices, extendible with thousands of packages.
keyFeatures: Full terminal emulator with VT100/xterm/screen support on Android
apt/pkg package manager with thousands of Linux packages
Customizable extra keys toolbar for touch keyboard input
Multiple terminal sessions in a single app
Plugin ecosystem: Termux:API, Termux:Boot, Termux:Float, Termux:Styling, Termux:Tasker, Termux:Widget
RUN_COMMAND intent for running commands from external apps
File sharing and viewing via Android intents
termux-shared library for plugin development via JitPack
publicApiSurface: TERMUX_SERVICE extras: EXTRA_EXECUTE_IN_BACKGROUND, EXTRA_ARGUMENTS, EXTRA_STDIN, EXTRA_WORKING_DIRECTORY, EXTRA_BACKGROUND_CUSTOM_LOG_LEVEL
RUN_COMMAND_SERVICE extras: EXTRA_EXECUTE_IN_BACKGROUND, EXTRA_COMMAND_PATH, EXTRA_ARGUMENTS, EXTRA_STDIN, EXTRA_WORKING_DIRECTORY, EXTRA_SESSION_ACTION, EXTRA_PENDING_INTENT
termux.properties keys: extra-keys, back-key, volume-keys, fullscreen, night-mode, terminal-cursor-style, terminal-transcript-rows, bell-character, default-working-directory
